name: QA 1243
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1243

Exercise shell mechanism in pmDiscoverServices(3).



Copyright (c) 2018 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform centos7 reproduce
